title: C2: Destination IP Drilldown
description: Summarizes suspicious C2 destinations across Sysmon network events, VCN Flow Logs, and Network Firewall logs. Includes hostname and byte evidence when those fields are present.
query: ((('Log Source' = 'SOC Sysmon Network Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'Windows Sysmon Operational Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'SOC Windows Sysmon Logs') and 'Event ID' = '3' and ('Destination IP' = '198.51.100.77' or 'Destination Hostname' like '*duckdns.org' or 'Destination Hostname' like '*malware.xyz' or 'Destination Hostname' like '*attacker.top' or 'Destination Hostname' like '*cobalt.example.com' or 'Destination Port' = 4443 or 'Destination Port' = 8443)) or (('Log Source' = 'SOC VCN Flow Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'SOC Network Firewall Logs') and ('Destination IP' = '198.51.100.77' or 'Threat Name' = 'Suspicious Data Exfiltration'))) | stats count as Connections, unique('Destination Hostname') as Hostnames, unique('Bytes Sent') as BytesSent by 'Log Source', 'Source IP', 'Destination IP', 'Destination Port' | sort -Connections | head 25

ask_ai_prompts: Which source and destination pair is the strongest C2 candidate?
Use the byte evidence to separate beaconing from exfiltration.

falsepositives: Known test C2 destination in the demo dataset
